title: Cane (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cane''' may refer to:
==Canon==
*[[Cane]], an object used to assist in someone walking.
*[[Sabercane]], a variation of the [[Lightsaber]].

==Legends==
*[[Cane/Legends|Cane]], an object used to assist someone in walking.
*[[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]], [[Yuvernian/Legends|Yuvernian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].
*[[Emperor's cane]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Dark side artifact/Legends|artifact]].
*[[Hissing cane]], a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] found on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].
*[[Long-handle lightsaber|Lightsaber cane]], a variation of the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
*[[Sabercane/Legends|Sabercane]], a [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] variation. 

Or, it could be a misspelling of [[Kane]].
{{Disambig}}
